name: FrootAI
description: The uniFAIng glue for the GenAI ecosystem — MCP tools for architecture guidance, solution plays, AI primitives, model comparison, cost estimation, and FAI Protocol orchestration. From the Roots to the Fruits.
features: Production-ready AI solution plays — Enterprise RAG, Multi-Agent, Voice AI, Edge AI, Agentic RAG, Browser Agent, and more
Comprehensive AI primitives — agents, instructions, skills, hooks, plugins
FAI Protocol v2.0 — declarative context-wiring with moonshot contract types
MCP server with knowledge, live, agent-chain, ecosystem, engine, scaffold, and marketplace tools
VS Code extension with FAI Engine, DevKit/TuneKit/SpecKit scaffolding
FROOT knowledge modules covering AI architecture end-to-end
Infrastructure as Code — Bicep + Terraform for every Azure play
Multi-channel distribution — npm, PyPI, VS Code, Docker, GitHub Actions, CLI
